page.title: Bang Galaxy
page.subtitle: Generate, preview, and manage galaxies via the sw2102-bang engine.

overview.title: Current Galaxy
overview.noGalaxy: No galaxy has been generated yet.
overview.versionMismatchWarning: Active galaxy was generated by bang {{galaxyVersion}}, but the gameserver is now running bang {{serverVersion}}. Regenerate to refresh.

common.seedHelp: Deterministic 64-bit integer. Same seed + same params produces an identical galaxy.

advanced.zoneSumWarning: Zone percentages should sum to 100. Current total: {{total}}.

expert.rawConfigJsonHelp: Paste a JSON object. Empty = use the form fields.

preview.title: Preview Stats
preview.noPreview: Run Preview to see stats here.

errors.invalidJson: Raw config JSON is not valid: {{error}}

history.title: Generation History
history.empty: No generations yet. Run a generation to see it here.

log.title: Generation Log
log.subtitle: Live stderr from sw2102-bang. Color-coded by warning category.

wipe.title: Wipe Galaxy
wipe.warning: This will permanently delete the galaxy "{{galaxyName}}" and all sectors, planets, stations, ships, and player progress it contains. There is no recovery.
wipe.prompt: Type the galaxy name exactly to confirm:
wipe.mismatch: The typed name does not match.

errors.isolatedSector: An isolated sector was found ({{code}}). Try a different seed.
errors.maxWarpsExceeded: A sector exceeds the maximum warp cap ({{code}}).
errors.oneWayWarpUnreachable: A one-way warp leads to an unreachable sector ({{code}}).
errors.fragmented: Generated galaxy is too fragmented to play. Try a different seed.
errors.duplicateSectorNumber: Bang produced a duplicate sector number ({{code}}). File a bang bug.
errors.commodityCoverage: Not every commodity is buy-able and sell-able across the galaxy ({{code}}).
errors.priceRangeOutOfBand: A station price falls outside the canonical band ({{code}}).
errors.stationDensityLow: Station density is below the configured target ({{code}}).
errors.formationCountMismatch: Special formation counts diverge from the target ({{code}}).
errors.planetWithoutHost: A planet was placed in a sector without a host ({{code}}).
errors.heuristicFallback: Bang fell back to a heuristic placement ({{code}}).
errors.topologyRescue: Bang ran topology rescue to repair the graph ({{code}}).
errors.bubbleFallback: Bang fell back to bubble seeding ({{code}}).
